_test_note: SHOT_001-005 were regenerated again on 2026-07-12 (multi-panel manga layout redesign — see skills/prompt-compiler/SKILL.md 'Формат зображення: багатопанельна композиція'): each is now a 3-panel manga-page composition with empty speech bubbles for dialogue beats and intentional onomatopoeia SFX text for action beats, instead of a single continuous illustration. All 5 passed Image QA on the first attempt. SHOT_006 onward still reflect the original single-panel 58-shot/26-scene run, have not been QA-checked or converted to multi-panel, and are stale until the full storyboard/shot-package regeneration is done.
